items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of a 'Linked to original (parent-child relationship)', but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this relationship exists in the current saga run. The evidence does not demonstrate that the necessary parent-child linkage has been established or validated, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement coverage. The prior step evidence does not address this specific requirement, indicating a gap in the validation process.
